Created attachment 166386
libbson update 1.3.1

There is new version of libbson. I've made a new patch. Also mongo-c-driver should be updated (I've made a patch). Both updates were checked with poudriere: https://rtm.bsdserwis.com/poudriere/data/a1amd64-testing/2016-02-01_01h14m16s/logs/libbson-1.3.1.log and
https://rtm.bsdserwis.com/poudriere/data/a1amd64-testing/2016-02-01_01h36m57s/logs/mongo-c-driver-1.3.1.log
